613 X0600D_CRCTN_SB_CLNCL_CHG_CD X0600D_CRCTN_SB_CLNCL_CHG_CD X0600D Correction Swing Bed Clinical Change Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the Swing Bed Clinical Change Assessment (A0310D) value from the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. 0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank (Skip Pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
